reviews.comment:
Lugar estratégico, cruce de ruta 5 y 33. Cadena de YPF full. Se complica un poco para cargar sobre todo naftas   si hay muchos vehículos.

(Translated by Google)
Strategic location, intersection of Routes 5 and 33. Full YPF chain. It gets a bit complicated to get fueled, especially gasoline, if there are a lot of vehicles.
